2603.26515.title: JAL-Turn: Joint Acoustic-Linguistic Modeling for Real-Time and Robust Turn-Taking Detection in Full-Duplex Spoken Dialogue Systems
2603.26515.paper_summary: Despite recent advances, efficient and robust turn-taking detection remains a significant challenge in industrial-grade Voice AI agent deployments. Many existing systems rely solely on acoustic or semantic cues, leading to suboptimal accuracy and stability, while recent attempts to endow large language models with full-duplex capabilities require costly full-duplex data and incur substantial training and deployment overheads, limiting real-time performance. In this paper, we propose JAL-Turn, a lightweight and efficient speech-only turn-taking framework that adopts a joint acoustic-linguistic modeling paradigm, in which a cross-attention module adaptively integrates pre-trained acoustic representations with linguistic features to support low-latency prediction of hold vs shift states. By sharing a frozen ASR encoder, JAL-Turn enables turn-taking prediction to run fully in parallel with speech recognition, introducing no additional end-to-end latency or computational overhead. In addition, we introduce a scalable data construction pipeline that automatically derives reliable turn-taking labels from large-scale real-world dialogue corpora. Extensive experiments on public multilingual benchmarks and an in-house Japanese customer-service dataset show that JAL-Turn consistently outperforms strong state-of-the-art baselines in detection accuracy while maintaining superior real-time performance.
2603.26515.paper_summary_zh: 儘管最近有了進展，但高效且穩健的輪流發言檢測在工業級語音 AI 代理的部署中仍然是一個重大挑戰。許多現有系統僅依賴於聲學或語義線索，導致準確性和穩定性不佳，而最近試圖賦予大型語言模型全雙工能力的嘗試需要昂貴的全雙工數據，並產生可觀的訓練和部署開銷，限制了實時性能。在本文中，我們提出了 JAL-Turn，一種輕量級且高效的僅語音輪流發言框架，採用聯合聲學-語言建模範式，其中一個交叉注意模塊自適應地將預訓練的聲學表示與語言特徵整合，以支持低延遲的保持與轉移狀態預測。通過共享一個凍結的 ASR 編碼器，JAL-Turn 使得輪流發言預測能夠與語音識別完全並行運行，並不引入額外的端到端延遲或計算開銷。此外，我們還引入了一個可擴展的數據構建管道，該管道自動從大規模的現實世界對話語料庫中推導出可靠的輪流發言標籤。在公共多語言基準和內部的日本客服數據集上進行的廣泛實驗表明，JAL-Turn 在檢測準確性上始終超越強大的最先進基準，同時保持卓越的實時性能。
2603.26515.author: Guangzhao Yang et.al.
2603.26515.authors: Guangzhao Yang, Yu Pan, Shi Qiu, Ningjie Bai
